subTitle: Everything you need to know about working with Gwave Innovation — from minimum orders to data confidentiality.

faqs.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqs.answer: There's no rigid minimum. We're set up to handle single-unit prototypes all the way to bulk production runs on the same standardized line, so you get consistent quality at any volume.

faqs.question: Do you source components and PCBs, or do I supply them?
faqs.answer: Both. We offer full turnkey sourcing of components and bare PCBs, or we can assemble using parts and boards you supply (consignment). We'll recommend whichever fits your project.

faqs.question: Which services do you offer in-house?
faqs.answer: Component sourcing, PCB sourcing, automated SMT pick-and-place assembly, manual assembly, board testing, IC programming, and box build assembly — plus plastic injection molding as a separate division.

faqs.question: How do you ensure quality from prototype to bulk?
faqs.answer: Every service runs on a documented standard operating procedure and uses specialized SMT equipment, so the same process produces the same result whether it's your first board or your ten-thousandth.

faqs.question: How do you protect my design data?
faqs.answer: Your designs, BOMs, and production files are treated as confidential, with controlled access and version integrity throughout the job.

faqs.question: How do I get a quote?
faqs.answer: Send us your requirements, BOM, and Gerber files through the contact page and our team will get back to you with a quotation and timeline.
